issue_title: Exception on a tag is edited by press the enter
issue_body_preview:
<!--
IF YOU DON'T FILL OUT THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION WE WILL CLOSE YOUR ISSUE WITHOUT INVESTIGATING
-->

**I'm submitting a ...**  (check one with "x")
```
[x] bug report => search github for a similar issue or PR before submitting
[ ] feature request
[ ] support request/question
```


*
test_description_zh: 在 ngx-chips 标签输入组件中，点击已有标签进入编辑模式，修改标签内容后按下 Enter 键确认编辑，观察是否正常完成编辑操作。
expected_result_zh: 按下 Enter 键后，标签应成功更新为编辑后的内容，不应抛出异常或报错，组件应正常恢复到非编辑状态。
